runner: Claude Code Agent tool, fresh general-purpose subagents per condition

grader.provenance: same Claude Code session, graded manually against evals.json and the skill references

limitations: Only one trial was run per eval and condition; no standard deviation is reported.
Token usage and duration were not captured for the subagent runs.

Each condition was produced by a fresh, isolated subagent (Agent tool with model:sonnet); the with-skill agent was instructed to invoke the Skill tool before answering, and the without-skill agent was instructed not to use any MessageFormat 2 skill.

Reasoning effort for the subagents under test could not be pinned via the Agent tool's schema, which has no effort parameter; subagents inherited the session's default reasoning behavior. The manifest records 'medium' as the user-selected target, not a verified per-call setting.
Grading was performed by the coordinating Claude Sonnet 5 session reading the raw responses against evals.json and the skills' own reference files, not by a separately configured grading harness.
